seedanceSegments.title: Cream hook and pistachio crunch
seedanceSegments.description: Open with burrata rupture, then jump back to roasted pistachio crunch preparation.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the shot-specific overhead view for the plate and chopping board. Use @InductionCloseup only for the dry skillet roasting view. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible Licorn hands. Use @chef_knife and @cutting_board only for pistachio chopping. Use @Spoon only for the burrata tear. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, sensual food-porn macro, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only burrata tear, nut crackle, dry skillet ticks, knife crunch. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s spoon tears burrata over glossy orecchiette; 1.0-1.8s roasted pistachio shards and golden crumbs rain over cream; 1.8-2.5s hard cut back to pistachios beside dry skillet; 2.5-3.6s nuts fall into skillet; 3.6-4.7s nuts roast with lightly blistered edges; 4.7-6.0s chef knife chops cooled nuts into rough shards. Scale lock: pistachio pieces 3-6 mm, one-to-two tablespoon final sprinkle per plate, not green powder, not giant chunks. Kitchen lock: same light terrazzo counter and black flush induction, no wood counter. Global negatives: no spaghetti, no generic green dust, no burnt nuts, no text, no music, no extra shots.

seedanceSegments.title: Orecchiette in boiling water
seedanceSegments.description: Cook the creator-requested orecchiette and show the reserved starchy water.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not framing. Use @InductionWide as the shot-specific kitchen view for the boiling pot, and @InductionCloseup for macro steam and shell details. Use @SaucepanLarge only as the pasta pot reference. Use @SpiderSkimmer only for lifting orecchiette. Use @CharacterSheet only for visible Licorn hands. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 4 seconds, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro steam and glossy pasta, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; boiling water, pasta splash, skimmer drip only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s orecchiette shells pour into salted boiling water; 0.8-1.7s shells tumble in steam; 1.7-2.8s spider skimmer lifts a few al dente shells; 2.8-4.0s cloudy reserved pasta water pours into a glass. Scale lock: orecchiette are small ear-shaped cups about 2-3 cm wide relative to the skimmer holes, not spaghetti, not giant shells, not miniature grains. Kitchen lock: black flush induction and same cabinetry from references. Global negatives: no spaghetti strands, no flames, no overcooked mush, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Crispy caper breadcrumb topping
seedanceSegments.description: Make the dry golden caper breadcrumb topping that later mixes with pistachio crunch.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not framing. Use @InductionCloseup as the shot-specific skillet view; use @InductionWide only if a wider induction identity is needed. Use @Spoon only for stirring and transferring. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots. ASMR food macro, sensual crunchy texture, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; butter hiss, crumb sizzle, caper pops, ceramic scrape. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s butter and olive oil melt glossy; 0.8-1.8s breadcrumbs scatter and begin to turn sandy gold; 1.8-3.0s capers wrinkle and pop with thyme and red chili flecks; 3.0-4.0s parmesan falls as pale speckles; 4.0-5.0s topping slides into a shallow bowl dry and loose. Texture lock: crumbs stay separate, sandy, golden, and crisp, not wet paste, not sauce. Kitchen lock: same black induction plate, no flame. Global negatives: no gummy breadcrumbs, no burnt black crumbs, no text, no music, no extra shots.

seedanceSegments.title: Lemon brown butter sizzle
seedanceSegments.description: Brown butter, garlic, lemon zest, and lemon juice create the glossy sauce base.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not framing. Use @InductionCloseup as the shot-specific sauce view; use @InductionWide only for stovetop continuity. Use @zester only for lemon zest, @lemon_squeezer only for lemon juice. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight only for visible Licorn hands. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sensual ASMR macro, hot glossy sauce, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; butter foam, garlic sizzle, zester rasp, citrus hiss. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s diced butter melts and foams; 1.0-2.0s foam collapses into honey-amber brown butter speckles; 2.0-2.8s minced garlic falls and blooms; 2.8-4.0s lemon zest rains in yellow curls; 4.0-5.0s lemon juice streams and bubbles bright. Physics lock: brown butter is honey amber with suspended milk solids, not black burnt butter and not pale melted butter. Kitchen lock: black flush induction, no flame, same kitchen materials. Global negatives: no burnt sauce, no watery soup, no text, no music, no extra shots.

seedanceSegments.title: Plate and rupture burrata

Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s warm low bowl lands on the terrazzo island; 0.8-2.1s glossy orecchiette spoons into one generous mound; 2.1-3.0s smooth burrata ball lands on top; 3.0-5.0s spoon splits burrata and thick cream slowly floods into the orecchiette cups. Kitchen lock: same light terrazzo counter, same Licorn kitchen, no redesigned table. Global negatives: no spaghetti, no tiny burrata dot, no full cheese explosion covering everything, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Creamy crunchy fork lift
seedanceSegments.description: End with fork lift and character satisfaction in the Licorn kitchen.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the shot-specific hero bowl view. Use @KitchenIslandWide only for the brief final character satisfaction context. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft only for Licorn identity and final satisfied posture. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.4s fork twists through orecchiette cups, burrata cream, crumbs, basil, and pistachios; 1.4-3.0s fork lifts a creamy crunchy bite with pistachio shards clinging; 3.0-4.5s Licorn leans in satisfied behind the bowl, food remains central; 4.5-6.0s final macro of glossy lemon-butter orecchiette, white burrata cream, golden caper crumbs, basil, and roasted pistachios. Scale lock: orecchiette cups remain 2-3 cm and visible on the fork, not spaghetti twirls. Kitchen lock: finished dish stays in the same Licorn kitchen; no table redesign. Global negatives: no spaghetti, no talking, no lyrics, no text, no music, no extra shots.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.4s fork twists through orecchiette cups, burrata cream, crumbs, basil, and pistachios; 1.4-3.0s fork lifts a creamy crunchy bite with pistachio shards clinging; 3.0-4.5s Licorn leans in satisfied behind the bowl, food remains central; 4.5-6.0s final macro of glossy lemon-butter orecchiette, white burrata cream, golden caper crumbs, basil, and roasted pistachios. Scale lock: orecchiette cups remain 2-3 cm and visible on the fork, not spaghetti twirls. Kitchen lock: finished dish stays in the same Licorn kitchen; no table redesign. Global negatives: no spaghetti, no talking, no lyrics, no text, no music, no extra shots.
